testcase.name: Mutant #1
testcase.failure:
--- codetiming/_timer.py +++ codetiming/_timer.py @@ -19,7 +19,7 @@ # Standard library imports from typing import Protocol, TypeVar
- T = TypeVar("T") + T = TypeVar("XXTXX")
class FloatArg(Protocol): """Protocol type that allows classes that take one float argument"""

testcase.name: Mutant #2
testcase.failure:
--- codetiming/_timer.py +++ codetiming/_timer.py @@ -19,7 +19,7 @@ # Standard library imports from typing import Protocol, TypeVar
- T = TypeVar("T") + T = None
class FloatArg(Protocol): """Protocol type that allows classes that take one float argument"""

testcase.name: Mutant #4
testcase.failure:
--- codetiming/_timer.py +++ codetiming/_timer.py @@ -43,7 +43,7 @@ class Timer(ContextDecorator): """Time your code using a class, context manager, or decorator."""
- timers: ClassVar[Timers] = Timers() + timers: ClassVar[Timers] = None name: Optional[str] = None text: Union[str, FloatArg, Callable[[float], str]] = "Elapsed time: {:0.4f} seconds" initial_text: Union[bool, str, FloatArg] = False

testcase.name: Mutant #6
testcase.system-out: text: Union[str, FloatArg, Callable[[float], str]] = "Elapsed time: {:0.4f} seconds"

testcase.name: Mutant #7
testcase.system-out: text: Union[str, FloatArg, Callable[[float], str]] = "Elapsed time: {:0.4f} seconds"

testcase.name: Mutant #9
testcase.failure: --- codetiming/_timer.py +++ codetiming/_timer.py @@ -46,7 +46,7 @@ timers: ClassVar[Timers] = Timers() name: Optional[str] = None text: Union[str, FloatArg, Callable[[float], str]] = "Elapsed time: {:0.4f} seconds" - initial_text: Union[bool, str, FloatArg] = False + initial_text: Union[bool, str, FloatArg] = None logger: Optional[Callable[[str], None]] = print last: float = field(default=math.nan, init=False, repr=False) _start_time: Optional[float] = field(default=None, init=False, repr=False)

testcase.failure:

testcase.name: Mutant #18
testcase.system-out: raise TimerError("Timer is running. Use .stop() to stop it")

testcase.name: Mutant #19
testcase.failure:
--- codetiming/_timer.py +++ codetiming/_timer.py @@ -57,7 +57,7 @@ raise TimerError("Timer is running. Use .stop() to stop it")

testcase.failure: --- codetiming/_timer.py +++ codetiming/_timer.py @@ -61,7 +61,7 @@ if isinstance(self.initial_text, str): initial_text = self.initial_text.format(name=self.name) elif self.name: - initial_text = "Timer {name} started".format(name=self.name) + initial_text = None else: initial_text = "Timer started" self.logger(initial_text)

self._start_time = time.perf_counter()

testcase.failure:
--- codetiming/_timer.py +++ codetiming/_timer.py @@ -63,7 +63,7 @@ elif self.name: initial_text = "Timer {name} started".format(name=self.name) else: - initial_text = "Timer started" + initial_text = None self.logger(initial_text)
self._start_time = time.perf_counter()

testcase.name: Mutant #27
testcase.system-out: raise TimerError("Timer is not running. Use .start() to start it")

testcase.failure:
--- codetiming/_timer.py +++ codetiming/_timer.py @@ -74,7 +74,7 @@ raise TimerError("Timer is not running. Use .start() to start it")

# Report elapsed time

testcase.failure:

testcase.system-out: UserDict = collections.UserDict[str, float] # pragma: no cover

testcase.failure:

testcase.name: Mutant #48
testcase.failure: --- codetiming/_timers.py +++ codetiming/_timers.py @@ -35,7 +35,7 @@ def __setitem__(self, name: str, value: float) -> None: """Disallow setting of timer values.""" raise TypeError( - f"{self.__class__.__name__!r} does not support item assignment. " + f"XX{self.__class__.__name__!r} does not support item assignment. XX" "Use '.add()' to update values." )
testcase.system-out: f"{self.__class__.__name__!r} does not support item assignment. "

testcase.name: Mutant #49
testcase.failure:
--- codetiming/_timers.py +++ codetiming/_timers.py @@ -36,7 +36,7 @@ """Disallow setting of timer values.""" raise TypeError( f"{self.__class__.__name__!r} does not support item assignment. " - "Use '.add()' to update values." + "XXUse '.add()' to update values.XX" )
def apply(self, func: Callable[[List[float]], float], name: str) -> float:

testcase.name: Mutant #51
testcase.system-out: return self.apply(lambda values: min(values or [0]), name=name)

testcase.name: Mutant #52
testcase.system-out: return self.apply(lambda values: min(values or [0]), name=name)

testcase.name: Mutant #53
testcase.system-out: return self.apply(lambda values: min(values or [0]), name=name)

testcase.name: Mutant #54
testcase.system-out: return self.apply(lambda values: max(values or [0]), name=name)

testcase.system-out: return self.apply(lambda values: max(values or [0]), name=name)

testcase.name: Mutant #56
testcase.system-out: return self.apply(lambda values: max(values or [0]), name=name)

testcase.name: Mutant #57
testcase.system-out: return self.apply(lambda values: statistics.mean(values or [0]), name=name)

testcase.name: Mutant #58
testcase.system-out: return self.apply(lambda values: statistics.mean(values or [0]), name=name)

testcase.system-out: return self.apply(lambda values: statistics.mean(values or [0]), name=name)

testcase.name: Mutant #60
testcase.system-out: return self.apply(lambda values: statistics.median(values or [0]), name=name)

testcase.system-out: return self.apply(lambda values: statistics.median(values or [0]), name=name)

testcase.system-out: return self.apply(lambda values: statistics.median(values or [0]), name=name)

testcase.name: Mutant #63
testcase.failure:
--- codetiming/_timers.py +++ codetiming/_timers.py @@ -71,7 +71,7 @@
def stdev(self, name: str) -> float: """Standard deviation of timings.""" - if name in self._timings: + if name not in self._timings: value = self._timings[name] return statistics.stdev(value) if len(value) >= 2 else math.nan raise KeyError(name)

testcase.name: Mutant #64
testcase.failure: --- codetiming/_timers.py +++ codetiming/_timers.py @@ -72,7 +72,7 @@ def stdev(self, name: str) -> float: """Standard deviation of timings.""" if name in self._timings: - value = self._timings[name] + value = None return statistics.stdev(value) if len(value) >= 2 else math.nan raise KeyError(name)

testcase.name: Mutant #65
testcase.failure: --- codetiming/_timers.py +++ codetiming/_timers.py @@ -73,6 +73,6 @@ """Standard deviation of timings.""" if name in self._timings: value = self._timings[name] - return statistics.stdev(value) if len(value) >= 2 else math.nan + return statistics.stdev(value) if len(value) > 2 else math.nan raise KeyError(name)
testcase.system-out: return statistics.stdev(value) if len(value) >= 2 else math.nan

testcase.name: Mutant #66
testcase.failure: --- codetiming/_timers.py +++ codetiming/_timers.py @@ -73,6 +73,6 @@ """Standard deviation of timings.""" if name in self._timings: value = self._timings[name] - return statistics.stdev(value) if len(value) >= 2 else math.nan + return statistics.stdev(value) if len(value) >= 3 else math.nan raise KeyError(name)
testcase.system-out: return statistics.stdev(value) if len(value) >= 2 else math.nan
